# Margo Hairstylist, full content for AI ingestion

## About

Margo Hairstylist is a qualified hairstylist with a home studio in Snells Beach, Auckland, New Zealand. Margo built a loyal following in Auckland before opening her own studio in Snells Beach, and many clients still travel to see her. She is known for listening well, having a good eye for what suits each client, and caring for the health of the hair as much as the finished look. She works only with professional, organic and cruelty-free products. Margo treats every appointment as a chance to teach, not just to cut: she explains the how and the why and shares honest advice so you can look after your hair at home. She is rated 4.9 out of 5 on Google.

## Services

- Cuts & Styling: women, men and kids. Cuts shaped to suit the client and to grow out well, finished with a proper blow wave.
- Colour: full colour, root touch-ups, foils and balayage using professional Wella colour, always mindful of the health of the hair.
- Nanoplastia, Keratin & Straightening: nanoplastia, keratin and straightening treatments that reduce frizz and make everyday hair far more manageable.
- Curly Hair: curl-literate cutting and styling that works with the natural pattern rather than against it.
- Treatments & Blow Waves: deep hydration treatments and salon blow waves, using professional, organic and cruelty-free products.

Pricing is by consultation, so clients always know the cost before starting. Reviews consistently describe the prices as reasonable and excellent value.

## Shop (professional, organic, cruelty-free hair care)

Margo sells the professional, organic and cruelty-free products she trusts in the studio, from brands like Angel, Brelil, De Lorenzo, Paul Mitchell and Wella: shampoos, conditioning treatments, styling and finishing sprays, colour-protect masks and gift sets. Products can be added to an online cart and checked out, or collected and paid for at an appointment.

## What clients say (Google reviews, 4.9 out of 5)

- Anne-marie Marsh: "I absolutely love Margo and her wizardry as a hairdresser. I followed her from Auckland because I love how she cuts and styles my hair. Her prices are very reasonable and she is so lovely. Look no further."
- Lisa Lowe: "Really happy with my keratin treatment. It has made my hair so much more manageable. Margo really listens and is skilled at what she does."
- Jo Campling: "I love Margo. Every time I see her I feel like I'm leaving with a bit more wisdom about life, as well as a great hair do. The Snells Beach community are lucky to have her."
- Elaine Brand: "What an amazing experience my first visit with Margo was. She knew exactly what to do with my curly hair. What a blessing."
- Martin Gray: "My third time having a great men's cut from Margo. She works fast and accurately and always gives me the cut I ask for. Very professional."
- Isabella Van Hulten: "Margo is great. So knowledgeable and such a good eye for what suits you while considering the health of your hair. Highly recommended."
- Vicki Partridge: "This lady is a very talented and beautiful soul. Her prices are really excellent and the products she uses are specific to her client, not generic."

## Contact and booking

- Phone (call): 021 202 9441
- Text (SMS): 021 202 9441
- Studio: 121 Mahurangi East Road, Snells Beach 0920, Auckland, New Zealand
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm. Saturday, 9am to 1pm. Closed Sunday.
- Bookings are taken by phone call or text and written into Margo's booking book by hand. Walk-ins are welcome during opening hours. There is no email address and no online booking form.
